Runtime registration helpers for interface plugins.

# Import

```ts
import { registerPlugin } from "@dartwic/interface-sdk/runtime";
```

# Signature

```ts

```

# Behavior

- Validates that the plugin definition has an `id`.
- Creates `window.__dartwicPluginRegistry__` if needed.
- Registers a `createPlugin(hostApi)` factory under the plugin id.
- Stores the host API before returning the plugin.

# Source

- `sdk/interface_plugin_sdk/runtime.ts`
